description: Winning sequences for ls20 levels 1-2. Source: companion_arcprize.md @LAT-140LON10.

levels.description: Manual — cluster row position varies per game instance; no reliable fixed sequence.
levels.note: Play interactively via --server mode. Locate cluster in first frame (cols 20-22, rows vary). Optimal route once cluster found: trail-overlap collection then UP through shaft to entity2. See companion_arcprize.md @LAT20LON-30 for mechanic details.

levels.description: HYPOTHESIS (session 13) — 51-step route. TWO FATAL FLAWS DISCOVERED — DO NOT EXECUTE BLINDLY. See note.
levels.note: FLAWS (session 12 @locus log analysis): Flaw 1 — Step 31 (RIGHT) fires at entity1 state 1; direction restriction may block it (session 10 evidence; unvalidated vs void collision). Flaw 2 — Phase 4 DOWN from rows 10-11 c14-18 hits A-wall at c15-17; block at c14-18 includes c15-17 = BLOCKED. c9-13 bypass exists geometrically but also requires RIGHT at state 1. SESSION 13 PROTOCOL: execute steps 1-27 (A-reset + cross), then PROBE RIGHT — if movement occurs direction restriction is NOT real and c9-13 bypass works; if blocked redesign required. See @LAT-160LON10 Post-Summary Findings and @LAT-140LON10.

verify_start.note: After first action (RIGHT), block should be at rows 40-41 cols 34-38.

11ring_A.note: DOWN to rows 15-16 c14-18 — FULL TIMER RESET fires

cross_collect.note: DOWN to rows 45-46 c49-53 — cross collected, state 0->1, timer=12

11ring_B_probe.note: LEFT×2 to rows 50-51 c39-43 — B probe, IF full reset timer=42

entity2_entry.note: DOWN to rows 40-41 c14-18 — entity2 interior, state=1, WIN expected
